roa.docketEntryComment: Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
Order of Victim Restitution or CR-110 & Abstract of Judgment for Restitution (CR-111)

/CAL: FILING OF CR-110 & CR-111/DAWT/X:CR-110 & CR-111 ARE SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO PAY RESTITUTION TO THE CITY AND COUNTY OFSAN FRANCISCO IN THE AMOUNT OF $535 PLUS INTEREST AT 10% PER YEAR FROM THEDATE OF SENTENCING ON 01-24-22/COLLECT/

/CAL:SENTENCING/TWS/CH1:ISS:CPROB:PROB 1 Y:PJ 8 D/CTS:8/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/SUSFF/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/DEF:STIPULATES TO RESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $535 TO THE SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT/X:DEFENDANTHAS COMPLETED A FINANCIAL WAIVER REQUEST WHICH HAS BEEN PLACEDIN THE DOCKET,/CONTD:FILING OF CR-110 AND CR-111/DAWF/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/DEF:MAKES A MOTION PURSUANT TO PC 17(B) AS TO COUNT 1/MO GRTD/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTSENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 12-17-21 (10TH)/X: THE 60TH LAST DAY IS 02-01-22/ORMS/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE:1 HOUR/
/CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING/X DUE TO DEFENDANT'S LATE APPEARANCE TO COURT, CSE IS NOW ON LOVE WAIVER STATUS/CONT/DOP/X EST 1 HOUR/
